title: Add SieveRuntime trait and DefaultRuntime
description: Add pub trait SieveRuntime { fn file_into, fn reject, fn discard, fn unknown_command }. Add DefaultRuntime that collects into Vec<SieveAction>. Wire public evaluate() through DefaultRuntime. Do NOT refactor evaluator internals to be generic over SieveRuntime — that is a follow-up. This is preparatory scaffolding only. See PROJECT.md Step 5.
